commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can sanitize the new diagnostic and add one regression test without requiring product judgment.; Needs attention: The diff has one concrete terminal/log safety issue: the new diagnostic prints an unsanitized user-supplied requestId.; Review finding: [P2] Sanitize the requestId in the stale diagnostic — src/cli/devices-cli.runtime.ts:194 (sha=ab1d5baee1ac55c48c828cd8a009e01ae13cdf16)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the devices approve local fallback to throw an actionable stale request-id diagnostic that routes operators to `openclaw devices list`, with regression tests for zero, one, and multiple visible pending requests.

PR surface: Source +49, Tests +93. Total +142 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main returns `null` from the local approve fallback when a bare pairing-required gateway error meets a missing local requestId, and the caller reports only `unknown requestId`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can sanitize the new diagnostic and add one regression test without requiring product judgment.
